expected_behavior: Normal app credentials cannot perform it; the privileged path requires explicit authorization, purpose, time bound, audit, and safe output handling.
given: An operator needs cross-tenant maintenance, recovery, or investigation.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: Approval record, role assumption/revocation timestamps, accessed row counts, audit trail.
then: Normal app credentials cannot perform it; the privileged path requires explicit authorization, purpose, time bound, audit, and safe output handling.
verification_method: Integration rehearsal with denied app role and approved synthetic break-glass role.
when: A break-glass or maintenance path is requested.
